title: Production deploy + freshness automation + corrections/erratum process + disclaimers/branding
context: Production deploy is the M3 milestone exit and the penultimate step before Definition of Shipped. Water-quality data changes as violations open and resolve and as regulatory rules are updated. The corrections/erratum workflow is critical: a wrong published figure can drive real-world action, so there must be a documented, tested process to purge/replace a wrong figure and log the correction. Prominent and persistent 'not a substitute for official advisories' framing must be present on every page.
objective: Deploy the production static build and operationalize freshness + corrections: (1) static production build served over HTTPS from a static host (no app server); (2) automated freshness: scheduled snapshot refresh with snapshot dates + staleness flags surfaced to users; (3) corrections/erratum workflow that can purge/replace a wrong published figure and log the correction in an append-only erratum record; (4) prominent persistent 'not a substitute for official advisories' + 'not an official agency product unless endorsed' disclaimers on every page; (5) no agency logos reused; (6) neutral, non-partisan framing verified.
acceptanceCriteria: Static production build deployed over HTTPS; no app server; no server-side query log possible by design
Automated freshness: snapshot refresh is scheduled; snapshot dates and staleness flags are surfaced in the UI
Corrections/erratum workflow documented and tested: a wrong published figure can be purged, replaced, and logged in an append-only erratum record
Every page carries prominent persistent 'not a substitute for official advisories' and 'not an official agency product unless endorsed' disclaimers
No agency logos or official agency branding reused
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass
output: PR with production deploy configuration, freshness automation, corrections/erratum workflow, and disclaimer/branding review.
